answer: The average time to resolution for incidents in each category is as follows: Database (6.9 days), Hardware (7.4 days), Inquiry / Help (8.5 days), Network (6.2 days), and Software (7.1 days), with Inquiry / Help having the longest resolution time and Network having the shortest.
insight: Inquiry / Help incidents take, on average, 2.3 days longer to resolve compared to Network incidents, indicating a significant discrepancy in resolution times across categories.
